_comment_about_this_file: Template for --dart-define-from-file. Copy to dev.json / staging.json / production.json and edit. The copies are gitignored (see mobile/.gitignore) — only example.json is committed.
_comment_ORKESTRA_API_URL: Backend HTTP base URL. Defaults per environment: dev=http://localhost:3000, staging=https://staging-api.orkestra.cc, production=https://api.orkestra.cc. Override here. For Android emulator + the dev backend on the host, use http://10.0.2.2:3000. For a physical device, use the host machine's LAN IP (e.g. http://192.168.1.42:3000).
_comment_ORKESTRA_WS_URL: Backend WebSocket base URL. Same hostname rules as ORKESTRA_API_URL.
